name: Security hardening

title: "[Security]: "
labels: [security]

---

**Language:** English | [Deutsch](security_hardening.de.md)

## Note
English is preferred, but German is also accepted.

## Affected area
Which component is affected?
- Connector runtime behavior
- Configuration directives/defaults
- Logging/auditing
- Build/CI pipeline
- Docker/deployment
- Documentation

## Risk or threat scenario
Describe the risk, abuse case, or threat model.

## Proposed mitigation
Describe the hardening change you propose.

## Expected security improvement
What specific security improvement is expected?

## Possible breaking changes
Could this hardening change impact existing setups or defaults?

## Testing considerations
How should this be validated (unit/smoke/runtime tests, config checks, negative tests)?
